title: agoseris heterophylla var. crenulata
intro: Agoseris heterophylla var. crenulata, also known as the hairy mountain dandelion or crenulate agoseris, is a rare flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Agoseris heterophylla var. crenulata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice for topical use, although its uses are largely anecdotal and require further research to confirm its efficacy.
